name: chain__building_a_clay_alternative_for_lead_en
method:
building a clay alternative for lead enrichment, would love feedback from agency owners :) hey everyone,

i’m part of a small team building a lead enrichment and prospecting platform that sits in the

stages.task: Ingest raw lead list (name, company, domain). Scrape company sites for size, industry, tech stack via free APIs and Google cache.
Waterfall enrichment: Hunter.io free (50/mo) → Clearbit free reveal → Google dorking for emails → LinkedIn public profile via Google cache. Fill: email, title, LinkedIn URL, company size.
Score leads 1-10 based on: company size fit, tech stack match, hiring signals, funding signals. Flag top 20% as hot.
Route hot leads to cold outbound pipeline. Package full enriched CSV for client delivery if gig-based. Update LEDGER tracking.
